description_long: This radiator features a tall, narrow rectangular form with three prominent vertical orange finned columns mounted on a flat, light-colored back panel. The fins are tightly spaced and run the full height of the radiator, maximizing surface area for heat dissipation. At the bottom, two pipe connection points are visible, suggesting inlet and outlet for water or steam. The radiator's design is minimalist, with no visible grille or decorative cover, emphasizing function over ornamentation. The orange color of the fins contrasts sharply with the neutral back panel, making the heating elements visually distinct. The overall construction appears robust, likely intended for wall mounting in urban interiors such as hallways, stairwells, or utility rooms.
description: A tall, wall-mounted radiator with three vertical orange finned columns on a flat, light-colored panel and visible pipe connections at the bottom. The design is functional and minimalist, emphasizing heat dissipation.
description_view_0: Front view showing three vertical orange finned columns mounted on a flat, light-colored panel, with pipe connections visible at the bottom.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the slim profile of the radiator and the protrusion of the finned columns from the back panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying only the flat, light-colored back panel with no visible fins or connections.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slim profile and the depth of the orange finned columns.
attribute_pipe_connections: two bottom entry points, vertically aligned
